General.Name: Kingwell Group Ltd
General.Description: Kingwell Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development, property leasing, and property management services business in Mainland China. Kingwell Group Limited is involved in the development of villas, apartments, and commercial buildings; information technology services; transportation agency services; sale of parking lots; and provision of property management services and construction services. The company was formerly known as Sinotronics Holdings Limited and changed its name to Kingwell Group Limited in 2010. Kingwell Group Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui East, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Wing On Plaza, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
